chapters.title: Deep Origins
chapters.template: Based on a probabilistic comparison against the reference panel, your genetic profile is most consistent with populations originating in {continent_primary}. The patterns observed over thousands of variants commonly associate with individuals from {region_1}.

chapters.title: Maternal Lineage Focus
chapters.template: Your maternal haplogroup ({mt_haplogroup}) represents a deep, unbroken line of female ancestors. {mt_description}

chapters.title: Paternal Lineage Focus
chapters.template: Your paternal haplogroup ({y_haplogroup}) points to an unbroken line of male ancestry. {y_description}

chapters.title: Population Mixture & Journey
chapters.template: Human genomes are mosaics built over thousands of years of migration. Your DNA exhibits genetic similarities commonly found among the {pop_1} and {pop_2} reference groups. These approximate affinities suggest shared distant ancestors who traversed through {region_1} regions.

disclaimers: This experience is a visualization based on reference populations and probabilistic genetic similarity. It is not medical advice.
Ancestry estimates show similarity to modern reference samples, not definitive historical origins.
